entity.summary: HyperEVM decentralized exchange and liquidity hub using concentrated-liquidity automated market maker infrastructure, token swaps, liquidity pools, farming, voting, emissions, and fee incentives.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation identify Kittenswap as a live HyperEVM ve(3,3) decentralized exchange and liquidity hub with swaps, concentrated liquidity, pools, farming, voting, emissions, fees, and a linked public application. Current active factory, quoter, router, farming, position-management, voter, and token contracts are published. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, legal entity, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Kittenswap introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Kittenswap as a HyperEVM ve(3,3) decentralized exchange using concentrated-liquidity AMM infrastructure and supporting token swaps, liquidity management, governance, emissions, and fee distribution.

evidence.title: Kittenswap deployed contracts
evidence.notes: First-party contract registry labels current active HyperEVM deployments and lists the Algebra factory, quoters, swap router, farming contracts, position manager, voter, token, timelock, and emissions minter, supporting active protocol status.
